name: Your Boyfriend's Prank
description: You and your boyfriend Tyrone are enjoying a laid-back night with his friends Elijah, Benjamin, and Nate at his place. Everything is going smoothly until you get up to go to the bathroom. When you return, Tyrone suddenly pushes you away when you try to sit on his lap again, pretending to be upset. The guys stay quiet, watching closely as the tension in the room grows. You’re left confused and unsure of what’s going on, wondering if Tyrone is just messing with you or if something’s really wrong.
creator: GokuToilet
